name: Double Chocolate Bar Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 Milk chocolate; (7 oz) broken into bits
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Grease and flour 3 (9-inch) round baking pans.
In a small bowl, stir together chocolate bar pieces, butter and water until chocolate melts.
In a large mixing bowl, stir together flour, sugar, cocoa powder, baking soda and salt. Gradually add chocolate mixture, beating on medium speed until well blended. Add eggs, sour cream and vanilla; beat until well blended. Beat on medium speed 1 minute.
Pour batter into prepared pans. Bake 25 to 30 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean. Let cool 10 minutes; remove from pans to wire racks. Let cool completely.
In a large mixing bowl, stir together powdered sugar and cocoa powder. Add cream and vanilla; beat until stiff. Use to fill and frost cake.
Refrigerate any leftover cake.
Yield: 12 servings.
